TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kazakhstan, title = Kazakhstan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kazakhstan} }

S.FORM: Kazakhstan Itini i 48 00 N, 68 00 E, noAsiya ko Kazakhstan. Polong no sekalay i 2,724,900 sq km "saka 9 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 2,699,700 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 25,200 sq km " Polong i 18,360,353 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 77.40%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 1.20%, malo no roma to a sera 21.40%. siyoto O (((Astana)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 16 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Almazbek Atambayev , patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ka*akńßstan itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u ka*akńßstan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i *,***,*** s* km "saka * ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((astana)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i a…ĺma*b~b~v…ôk atamb~b~vaj…ôb~v , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Kazakhstan Itini i 48 00 N, 68 00 E, noAsiya ko Kazakhstan. Polong no sekalay i 2,724,900 sq km "saka 9 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 2,699,700 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 25,200 sq km " Polong i 18,360,353 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 77.40%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 1.20%, malo no roma to a sera 21.40%. siyoto O (((Astana)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 16 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Almazbek Atambayev , patirengan a romi'ad i 2011 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ka*akńßstan itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u ka*akńßstan. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i *,***,*** s* km "saka * ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((astana)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i a…ĺma*b~b~v…ôk atamb~b~vaj…ôb~v , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
